RANDOM EVENT
✦ 9-REEL MEGASLOT ✦
★★☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — EASY
Spin a 3×3 grid of 9 reels. Matching symbols across any of 8 win lines (3 rows, 3 columns, 2 diagonals) pays out. The centre row pays 1.5× bonus. A 💎 in the centre doubles ALL wins. Land the same symbol on all 9 reels for a 500× jackpot. 💀 and 🌀 are lose symbols — they cancel any line they appear in. Bet and click SPIN. That's it. Pure luck, minimal strategy.

🎰×3 = 75×

💎 in centre = 2× all wins
✦ COIN FLIP STREAK ✦
★☆☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — VERY EASY
Pick Heads or Tails. Each correct guess multiplies your payout — 1.5× on your first hit, 2×, 3×, 5×, 10× as the streak grows. Cash out at any time to lock in your winnings. One wrong guess wipes the whole streak. The longer you ride it, the bigger the reward — and the bigger the crash.
Chain correct flips for escalating multipliers. Cash out anytime.
🪙

Next win = 1.5× bet

1 win = 1.5× | 2 = 2.5× | 3 = 4× | 4 = 7× | 5+ = 12×
✦ WAR ✦
★☆☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — VERY EASY
You and the dealer each draw one card from a standard deck. Highest card wins the pot at 1:1 payout. On a tie, you go to War — your bet doubles and one more card is drawn. Win the War and you get double. Lose and you're out. No decisions, no strategy — pure card fate. Aces are highest.
One card each. Highest wins. Tie = War — double or nothing.

Win = 2× | Tie = WAR (double bet, winner takes all)
✦ HI-LO ✦
★★☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — EASY
A card is revealed face-up. Predict whether the next card will be HIGHER or LOWER. Correct guesses build a streak and stack your multiplier — 1.2× at first, rising to 10× or more on a long run. Cash out at any time. One wrong guess ends the run and you lose your bet. The further you push, the better the payout — and the harder the fall.
Guess if the next card is higher or lower. Chain for multipliers!
🂠
Streak: 0
Multiplier: 1×

✦ SCRATCH CARD ✦
★☆☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — VERY EASY
Buy a scratch card and reveal 9 hidden squares one by one. Each square hides a symbol. Match 3 identical symbols anywhere on the card to win. Match 5 for a 5× bonus. Match 7 for a 20× mega win. Match all 9 for jackpot tier. Fully random — no decisions required. Just click SCRATCH and watch.
Reveal 9 squares. Match 3 to win. Match 5+ for jackpot!
CARD PRICE
50
100
250
500
3 match = 3× | 4 match = 8× | 5+ match = JACKPOT 25×
✦ BACCARAT ✦
★★☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — EASY
Place your bet on Player, Banker, or Tie before cards are dealt. Both sides receive two cards. Card values: Aces = 1, 2–9 = face value, 10/J/Q/K = 0. Only the last digit of the total counts (e.g. 15 = 5). Closest to 9 wins. A third card may be drawn automatically under fixed rules. Player wins pay 1:1. Banker wins pay 1.95:1 (slight house edge). Tie pays 8:1 but hits rarely.
Bet on Player or Banker. Closest to 9 wins. Simple. Elegant.
PLAYER
—
VS
BANKER
—
BET

50
100
500
Player/Banker win = 1.95× | Tie = 8× | Banker wins slightly more often
✦ WHEEL OF FORTUNE ✦
★★☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — EASY
Place your bet and spin the wheel. The wheel has 12 segments: six 0× (lose), two 1×, two 2×, one 3×, one 5×, and one 10× jackpot segment. The pointer at the top determines the result when it stops. Higher multipliers are rarer — the 10× segment is only one out of twelve. No skill involved, just spin and pray. Bar buffs can tilt the odds in your favour.
BET
25
50
100
250
✦ PLINKO ✦
★★☆☆☆ DIFFICULTY — EASY
Drop a ball from the top of a pegged board. The ball bounces off pegs randomly as it falls, landing in one of 12 slots at the bottom. Slots range from 0× (lose) on the edges, 0.5×, 1×, 1.5×, up to 3× in the centre — and a rare 500× jackpot slot on the far right. The ball's path is physics-driven and unpredictable. Higher bets mean bigger absolute payouts. No skill — just drop and watch.
Drop the ball. Watch it bounce. Pray.
BET
50
100
250
500
✦ KENO ✦
★★★☆☆ DIFFICULTY — MEDIUM
Pick between 3 and 10 numbers from a grid of 1–80. Once you've chosen, click DRAW. The house randomly draws 20 numbers. Count how many of your picks match the drawn numbers — this is your "hit" count. Payouts scale sharply with hits: 3 hits = 1×, 4 hits = 2×, 5 hits = 3×, 6 hits = 6×, 7 hits = 10×, 8 hits = 25×, 9 hits = 50×, 10 hits = 200×. Picking 10 numbers gives the best jackpot potential but the lowest chance of many matches. Picking 3–5 is safer but caps your upside.
Pick up to 10 numbers. House draws 20. More matches = bigger win.
Selected: 0/10
BET
50
100
250
3 hits=1× | 5=3× | 7=10× | 9=50× | 10=200×
✦ DICE DUEL ✦
★★★☆☆ DIFFICULTY — MEDIUM
You and the dealer each roll two dice. The higher total wins — payout is 1:1. On a tie, the pot pushes (you get your bet back). Additionally, place an optional side bet on an exact total (2–12). Hitting your exact number pays massive multipliers: total of 2 or 12 pays 30×, 7 pays 5×. Side bets are high risk, high reward. Main duel is straightforward but the side bet system adds real strategic depth.
You vs the dealer. Roll two dice each. Highest total wins.
Bet on exact totals for huge multipliers.

Make sure to take breaks! If you get too angry, you'll stop giving the house money!

4 phases. Bet blind, then raise or fold as cards are revealed one by one. Each raise compounds your exposure. Fold early and lose only your current stake. Stay in and risk everything — but the jackpot grows with every raise. The house always knows more than you.

THE MENU
✦ TROLL SHOP — UNLEASH CHAOS ON OTHER USERS ✦
Buy single-use troll effects with your G-Coins. They go to your inventory and can be fired at anyone on the site. Effects stack — buy multiples to use repeatedly.
YOUR INVENTORY
Nothing yet — buy something below!
★★★☆☆ DIFFICULTY — MEDIUM
You and the dealer are each dealt two cards. Your goal is to get as close to 21 as possible without going over (busting). Card values: numbered cards = face value, J/Q/K = 10, Ace = 1 or 11. HIT to take another card. STAND to hold. DOUBLE DOWN to double your bet and take exactly one more card. Dealer must hit until reaching 17+. Blackjack (Ace + 10-value on first two cards) pays 3:2. If you bust, you lose immediately regardless of the dealer's hand.
DEALER
YOUR HAND
10
25
50
100
BET: 25
✦ PLACE YOUR BET THEN SPIN ✦
★★★★☆ DIFFICULTY — HARD
Select a bet type from the grid, choose your chip size, then spin. Bet types: RED/BLACK pays 1:1, ODD/EVEN pays 1:1, LOW (1–18)/HIGH (19–36) pays 1:1, dozens (1st/2nd/3rd) pay 2:1. The wheel has 37 positions (0–36) — green 0 is the house edge and pays nothing on colour/even-odd/half bets. The house applies a 72% loss bias on spins — the wheel physically lands on a losing segment most of the time. Bar buffs are your best counter.
10

BET

— CHOOSE YOUR BET TYPE —
★★★★★ DIFFICULTY — VERY HARD
Place your bet BEFORE launch. Once you click BET & LAUNCH, a multiplier starts rising from 1.00× and climbs exponentially. Cash out at any time to lock in your multiplier as a payout. But the multiplier can crash to zero at any moment — and if it crashes before you cash out, you lose everything. The crash point is completely random and impossible to predict visually. There is no safe time to cash out. High rollers ride it to 5×+; most players crash before 2×. Pure nerve and timing.
1.00×

Select a room and click CONNECT
⚠ THESE AFFECT ALL USERS EXCEPT YOU — USE RESPONSIBLY (OR DON'T)
── MILD TROLLING ──
🐌 SLOW-MO MODEEveryone's text loads letter-by-letter like a typewriter
🙃 UPSIDE DOWNFlip the entire UI 180° for everyone else
🔬 TINY MODEShrink all text to 6px. squint to read
🔭 BIG MODEBlow everything up to 200%. horizontal scroll nightmare
── MEDIUM CHAOS ──
⏳ FAKE LAGRandom 2-5s delay before any button they click responds
🤦 AUTOCORRECT HELLSwap random words in their posts with nonsense before Firebase
👻 GHOST CURSORA second cursor drifts around everyone else's screen
🎨 WRONG THEMEForce everyone onto a random theme, changes every 60s
── PEAK CHAOS ──
💊 MATRIXReplace all text with cycling glyphs, decrypts after 5s
🌋 EARTHQUAKEPermanent escalating screen shake for everyone
🕵️ IMPOSTOR POSTYour next chat message posts under a recent user's name
🕳️ THE VOIDBlack circle expands from center eating the UI, then retracts
💀 FAKE CRASHFull-screen BSOD with random error code, lasts ~10s
👁 JUMPSCARESudden full-screen flash and loud burst, gone in 1s
🔀 CONTROLS SWAPPEDEvery button click fires a random different button instead
🪟 POPUP STORMFake dialog boxes keep appearing every 8s
🌀 PORTALSpinning rainbow vortex expands then retracts
📡 FAKE UPDATEFull-screen G-STUDIO UPDATING screen for ~12s
── MORE MEDIUM CHAOS ──
🌊 DRUNK MODEUI sways and wobbles like everything is underwater
📺 STATICTV static noise overlay flickers across the screen
🌈 RAINBOW TEXTAll text cycles through rainbow colors in real time
🖱 CURSOR TRAILGlowing orbs trail wherever the mouse moves
🔔 FAKE NOTIFICATIONSRandom fake system alerts pop up every 20-40s
🪞 MIRROREDEverything horizontally mirrored, text reads backwards
🎪 SPINNING UIWhole page slowly rotates 360 degrees then stops
🧲 STICKY BUTTONSButtons flee the cursor, you can never click them
🎵 WRONG SOUNDSEvery button plays a random horrible sound effect
🌧️ RAINING EMOJIRandom emoji fall from the top of the screen constantly
🔴 FAKE RECORDINGPulsing red REC indicator appears in the top corner
── MORE MILD ──
🐝 BUZZEvery click plays a short harsh sound
🎯 DRIFTING CURSORMouse cursor slowly sways sideways while moving
🔠 CAPSLOCK HELLRandomly SHOUTS words in their typed messages
🌫️ BLUR VISIONEverything slowly blurs in and out like bad eyesight
🐋 DANNY IS A FAT CHUD8 seconds of pure suffering for everyone
